mapper.sql: ENT.ENTITY_ID, ENT.CREATED_AT, ENT.UPDATED_AT, ENT.ACTIVATED_AT, ENT.STATE_ID, ENT.SCENARIO_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM ENTITIES ENT LEFT OUTER JOIN SCENARIOS SCNR ON SCNR.SCENARIO_ID = ENT.SCENARIO_ID WHERE ENT.ENTITY_ID = #{searchSet.entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ENT.STATE_ID = #{stateId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND ENT.CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND ENT.CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}'

SELECT ,
FROM ENTITIES ENT LEFT OUTER JOIN SCENARIOS SCNR ON SCNR.SCENARIO_ID = ENT.SCENARIO_ID WHERE ENT.ENTITY_ID IN
#{entityId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND ENT.CREATED_AT >= date '${searchSet.partitionLowerBoundaryDate}' AND ENT.CREATED_AT < date '${searchSet.partitionUpperBoundaryDate}'
